title: Crisis Residential Treatment * Disorders of Infancy/Childhood - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Crisis Residential Treatment * Disorders of Infancy/Childhood 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disorders of Infancy/Childhood Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALBERTINA KERR ALBERTINA KERR CRISIS PSYCHIATRIC CARE FOR YOUTH CRISIS PSYCHIATRIC CARE FOR YOUTH SUBACUTE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides safe and compassionate care to support youth stabilization, with most discharged within three weeks. The program offers a nurturing environment where youth can recover, reflect, and build skills for well-being and growth. Services include psychiatric evaluation and medication management, individual and family therapy, skill-building groups, daily therapeutic arts and recreation, continued school enrollment through Multnomah Education Service District, access to primary care assessments by nurse practitioners, and rapid psychological testing. 832 NE 162nd Avenue Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 408-4705 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBERTINA KERR CRISIS PSYCHIATRIC CARE FOR YOUTH SUBACUTE
